creator_mode: Fitness coach and live class instructor
audience: Busy young professionals (ages 24-35) looking for efficient home workouts and stress reduction routines

tiers.name: Single tier
benefits: 3 feed posts per week (short workout clips, tips)

current_problems: High churn after the first month; many subscribers join for novelty, then cancel
Exclusive content feels generic and similar to public social posts
No segmentation for advanced vs beginner audiences
Live sessions are not archived; latecomers get less value
exclusivity_definition: Mostly behind-the-scenes clips and informal notes; no structured member-only programs
constraints: No explicit adult content; professional wellness brand positioning
brand_notes: Tone is supportive, practical, and beginner-friendly. Emphasis on safe form and habit-building.
success_signals: Subscribers ask for short 20-minute follow-along routines
Positive feedback on guided mobility sessions and stress relief
Requests for progressive programs and private feedback
